goal: Attach a small, review-only visual reference PNG from the companion public Sentinel-2 L2A TCI COG without committing the full COG or promoting Pacuare production imagery.

output.processing: Full 10980x10980 TCI COG was downloaded to /private/tmp, decoded with sharp/libvips, and downsampled to a 1024x1024 PNG review image.

review_value: Provides the inland/western companion Sentinel tile needed beside 17PKM for lower Pacuare source selection.
Shows inland rainforest, terrain, cloud scatter, settlement context, and Pacific-side lowland/coast context for guide/geospatial discussion before corridor clipping.
limitations: This is the full 16PHR tile downsample, not a Pacuare corridor clip or stitched lower-river source drape.
The companion 17PKM tile is attached separately; both still need corridor-clipped COG reads and stitching before production imagery review.
No SCL/cloud mask, water/vegetation segmentation, CRS crop, terrain alignment, or manual guide QA is applied.
The review PNG must not be used as a texture, material source, photogrammetry input, AI-training source, production mask, or lifelike-capture evidence.

promotion_blockers: Record final Sentinel terms/attribution/package policy before using any Sentinel-derived imagery beyond review references.
Implement corridor-clipped COG reads for both 17PKM and 16PHR using a reviewed raster-window tool.
Apply SCL/cloud/shadow/haze QA and manual visual review before masks or source drapes are generated.
Compare imagery date and flow/rain context with guide/outfitter review before tuning river color, wetness, or flow-dependent visuals.
forbidden_use: production water or vegetation mask generation
